answer: The ROI stayed close to breakeven because the current model assumes only a modest retention lift outside the core YA audience, while localization has not been expanded yet.

risk_flags.summary: Higher-than-plan episode costs erase most upside.

evidence.snippet: Modeled retention lift is 0.7 points without additional localization investment.
evidence.claim_it_supports: The ROI case depends on modest retention lift assumptions.

warnings: Follow-up answer is based on cached ROI outputs.
